Rooms.title: Your Stay
Rooms.subtitle: Discover our minimalist rooms and suites, designed for ultimate relaxation and unobstructed views of the Aegean.
Rooms.suite_caldera_desc: Experience ultimate luxury with breathtaking views of the Santorini Caldera, featuring a private pool and high-end amenities.
Rooms.suite_infinity_desc: A masterfully designed suite featuring an endless infinity pool that blends seamlessly into the deep blue of the Aegean sea.
Rooms.suite_honeymoon_desc: The perfect romantic escape built directly into the volcanic cliffside, offering absolute privacy and a private outdoor jacuzzi.
Rooms.suite_royal_desc: Our crown jewel. Absolute privacy, unmatched space, two luxury bedrooms, and a sunset terrace with a private chef available.

Experiences.title: Bespoke Experiences
Experiences.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the raw beauty and refined culture of the Cyclades through meticulously curated journeys.
Experiences.dining_desc: An avant-garde exploration of Aegean heritage featuring ingredients harvested daily from our private estate.
Experiences.wellness_desc: Holistic physical restoration aligned with natural elements inside dramatic volcanic chambers.
Experiences.yachting_desc: Set sail aboard our custom catamaran fleet to witness the legendary Santorini sunset in absolute privacy.
Experiences.wine_desc: Decode the intense minerality and volcanic terroir of Europe's oldest self-rooted vineyards.

Gallery.title: Visual Exploration
Gallery.subtitle: A masterclass in architectural geometry, raw textures, and pure Cycladic light.

Testimonials.title: Guest Reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: The experiences of our guests, captured against the backdrop of the endless Aegean blue.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We are here to design your ideal stay together. Contact us for reservations or special requests.
Contact.access_desc: Situated on the highest crest of Imerovigli, Aethra commands absolute isolation while remaining effortlessly accessible.

About.title: Our Heritage
About.subtitle: Architectural symmetry, authentic Cycladic legacy, and the fine art of absolute stillness.
About.arch_desc: Aethra was conceived as a physical extension of the volcanic cliffside. Embodying clean minimalist geometries and traditional subterranean forms, the architecture frames a continuous dialogue between light and shadow, raw stone, and the infinite blue of the Aegean.
About.service_desc: We believe true luxury resides in absolute personalization. Our elite team is permanently available to anticipate your micro-needs, delivering an immersive stay that redefines the concepts of privacy, freedom, and stillness.

Explore.title: The Location Guide
Explore.subtitle: A meticulously curated insider’s guide to the hidden gems, raw heritage, and top culinary spots of Santorini.
Explore.akrotiri_desc: One of the most important prehistoric settlements of the Aegean, perfectly preserved under volcanic ash.
Explore.oia_desc: The quintessential island panoramic view framing the dramatic architectural geometry of the Caldera.
Explore.redbeach_desc: A rare geological marvel wrapped in soaring crimson volcanic cliffs and dark volcanic sand.
Explore.vlychada_desc: A breathtaking lunar landscape sculpted by centuries of Aegean winds and sea salt.
Explore.selene_desc: A pioneer of the island's fine dining scene, situated inside a historical majestic monastery setting.
Explore.pyrgos_desc: The highest village on the island, featuring an intact medieval fortified settlement and panoramic views.
Explore.amoudi_desc: A picturesque harbor nestled below Oia, world-renowned for its traditional waterfront fish tavernas.
Explore.perivolos_desc: An endless cosmopolitan stretch of fine black volcanic sand and crystal-clear deep waters.

Social.whatsapp_preset: Hello! I would like to inquire about suite availability and experiences at the resort.

Footer.description: The definition of Cycladic minimalist luxury. A sanctuary of peace in the deep blue of the Aegean.
Footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers and news.
